description:
Create an Epi Info 7 project named 'RespSurveillance' at /home/ga/Documents/RespSurveillance.prj. Design a form with two pages: 'Patient Information' and 'Clinical Information'. 

The 'Patient Information' page must include: 
- CaseID (Text, Required)
- FirstName (Text)
- LastName (Text)
- DOB (Date)
- Age (Number, Read Only)
- Sex (Legal Values: Male, Female, Unknown)
- County (Text)

The 'Clinical Information' page must include: 
- OnsetDate (Date)
- Fever (Yes/No)
- Cough (Yes/No)
- SoreThroat (Yes/No)
- Dyspnea (Yes/No)
